explanationHtml:
Step 1: Expand and collect like terms.
$x(r-7)+3=17x+25$
$xr-7x+3=17x+25$
$xr-24x=22$
$x(r-24)=22$

Step 2: Conditions for exactly one solution.
This is linear in $x$ with coefficient $(r-24)$. It has exactly one solution when $r-24 eq 0$, i.e. $r eq 24$. If $r=24$, the equation becomes $0=22$, which has no solution.

Step 3: Test all four choices.

  • Choice A — ‘3’: $r=3\Rightarrow r-24=-21 eq 0\Rightarrow$ exactly one solution; this CAN be $r$ ✗
  • Choice B — ‘7’: $r=7\Rightarrow r-24=-17 eq 0\Rightarrow$ exactly one solution; this CAN be $r$ ✗
  • Choice C — ‘22’: $r=22\Rightarrow r-24=-2 eq 0\Rightarrow$ exactly one solution; this CAN be $r$ ✗
  • Choice D — ‘24’: $r=24\Rightarrow r-24=0\Rightarrow 0=22\Rightarrow$ no solution; this CANNOT give exactly one solution ✓

That matches choice D — D is correct.
